Configured SMTP server may be spoofed with any certificate (e.g. self-signed), leaving credentials and all emails sent open to MITM attacks.

### Patches
The vulnerability has been patched in CKAN 2.10.10 and CKAN 2.11.5", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00194, "percentile": 0.09163}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T20:33:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41132"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T19:17:21Z", "published_at": "2026-04-29T20:33:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ckan/ckan/security/advisories/GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q", "https://docs.ckan.org/en/2.10/changelog.html#v-2-10-10-2026-04-29", "https://docs.ckan.org/en/2.11/changelog.html#v-2-11-5-2026-04-29", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41132", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ckan/ckan/security-advisories/GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ckan/ckan", "summary": "CKAN has no certificate validation on STMP connection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:39:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mpfm-fpgx-647q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.11.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ckan"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.11.0, <= 2.11.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.10.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ckan"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.10.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CKAN has no certificate validation on STMP connection
